text:
[Monologue]
Now there is, uh, one thing that, um, keeps my head above water
When things are getting tough
When I'm, uh, feeling like I'm too weird for this world
Just like, a permanent square peg in a permanent round hole
Like I'm permanently clawing my way up the side of the bell curve to stick my flag in the peak and slide my way back down over and over and over and over again
When I feel like I'm in this cycle of hopelessness - I'll never go anywhere, I'll never amount to anything, I'll never be anyone
Whenever I feel like a, uh, there's just no way I'll ever get out of this mess alive
There's one thing I keep in mind that really just makes things just swell
And I think it's worth setting a reminder every half hour on your phone, go for it man!
Put this thing on your phone
Never forget it, keep it in mind at all times, this one fact that just makes everything awesome
And if I just tell you what that thing is it's, uh, not really gonna translate
Um, so I- I wrote this song which I- I- I hope gets the point across cause, uh, god knows I wouldn't be able to
Um, just babbling at you like I'm doing right now
So, um, anyway
This is a song that I like to call "The most important thing in the world"
